title: DatasetConfig
description: Generic schema for configuring one or more datasets and their cross-dataset relationships.

foreign_keys.description: List of foreign key relationships between tables across datasets.

type.description: The data source technology type (e.g. bigquery, alloydb, postgres, mysql, snowflake).

name.description: Unique identifier name for the dataset.

description.description: Human-readable description of the dataset's purpose and contents.

TableRef.description: A reference to a specific column within a table in a dataset.

type.description: The data source technology type of the referenced dataset.

dataset.description: Name of the dataset containing the table.

table.description: Name of the table within the dataset.

column.description: Name of the column within the table.

ForeignKey.description: A foreign key relationship linking a child column to a parent (primary key) column.

child.description: The referencing (foreign key) side of the relationship.

parent.description: The referenced (primary key) side of the relationship.
